docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IVAN CHEN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KOOSHIAR AZIMIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, IVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZIMIAN, KOOSHIAR $2,516.13 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,606.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
